issues.description: Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'during this turn' which means the effect lasts only while it is your turn, not until end of turn.

Target scope is 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' but text says 'Up to 1 of your Characters' - should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter' (does not include Leader). However, this is a minor issue as the practical difference may be context-dependent.
